keyFindings: Zero execution telemetry in current Web UI -- Anthropic path non-streaming, Copilot path text-only with thinking blocks stripped by proxy
Anthropic streaming marked not yet implemented in skill-turn-executor.js line 333 (_callAnthropic is non-streaming)
Existing JSONL (platform/traces/) is outcome-based gate records, not execution event streams -- different schema and semantic
Phase 5 WS1 (hook event schema) and WS2 (subagent isolation) directly map to P6 and P5 -- this discovery formalises existing roadmap intent
No @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk dependency in repo -- Claude Agent SDK inner loop is Phase 5 WS2 scope, out of MVP
Cloud platform feature (2026-05-20) identifies tamper-evident audit trail as MVP capability -- depends on P6 telemetry being delivered first
adrCandidates: ADR-E1: outer-loop-provider-routing -- direct Anthropic API vs Copilot proxy telemetry depth implication
ADR-E2: execution-boundary-as-design-property -- P5 formal declaration in architecture-guardrails.md
ADR-E3: jsonl-execution-event-stream-schema -- P6 Tier 1/Tier 2 field definitions
ADR-E4: prompt-caching-strategy -- cache_control ephemeral for skill/standards content (60-70% cost reduction)
integrationPoints: src/modules/skill-turn-executor.js _callAnthropic() -- primary P6 integration point; streaming implementation needed
src/web-ui/routes/execute.js -- outer loop entry point; session path provides JSONL write location

confirmedRisks: Enterprise Copilot proxy path: thinking blocks stripped, Tier 2 telemetry unavailable -- Tier 1 only for that path
Data residency: direct Anthropic API path unsuitable for regulated consumers with data residency constraints
